## Validation

- [ ] Protocol artifacts pass when affected.
- [ ] Repository and website alignment passes when affected.
- [ ] No real personal, trip, asset, payment, donation, or credential data is included.
- [ ] New scope identifies the concrete failure it solves.
- [ ] This PR does not overstate implementation, safety, legality, or adoption.
- [ ] Every commit includes a Developer Certificate of Origin `Signed-off-by` line.
